spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  -- Create 10 minutes periods
  time_bucket_gapfill('10m', date_time) AS "time",
  
  device_id AS metric,
  
  -- Fill gaps with previous average values
  locf(avg(temperature)) AS "value"

FROM weather_telemetry 

WHERE
  $__timeFilter(date_time)
    AND device_id IN ($chosen_devices)

GROUP BY "time", metric
ORDER BY "time";

SELECT
  time_bucket_gapfill('10m', date_time) AS "time",
  device_id AS metric,
  locf(avg(temperature)) AS "value"
FROM weather_telemetry 
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(date_time)
    AND device_id = '$chosen_devices'
GROUP BY "time", metric
ORDER BY "time";

SELECT device_id FROM weather_telemetry GROUP BY device_id LIMIT 50
